name: Corvin Thale

equipment.armour: civilian clothes, padded vest under coat

sd_appearance: Human, of average height and build, Corvin Thale, a Lieutenant-Inspector, is distinguished by his heavy-set frame and deliberate movements. His skin is weathered, bearing the marks of a life spent in the Undercity's grime. His hair, a matted mass of dark strands, is shorn short, and his eyes, a piercing grey, hold a steely resolve. Dressed in civilian attire, he wears a faded ash-grey coat over a padded vest, concealing a short sword at his waist and a crossbow slung over his back. A battered ledger is clutched tightly in his hand, and a distinctive ash-mark, marking him as an officer of the Wardens of Ash, is etched upon his left cheek.
faction_visual: ash grey chainmail or plate, Warden badge, ash-mark on left cheek if officer
style_note: civilian, unremarkable by design — carrying a ledger and looking exhausted
